_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: ROC analysis further demonstrated an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.83, which was higher with approximately 0.6× ULP-WGS than approximately 0.3×
details: Differentiated MPNST from PN with AUC of 0.83, sensitivity of 75% and specificity of 91% using plasma tumor fraction at 0.6× coverage
